section_miscategorizations.text: He reports being on clopidogrel and will stop it before surgery.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The first clause (being on clopidogrel) is appropriate for S as current medication state, but the second clause (will stop it before surgery) reflects a management plan rather than purely subjective history. Ideally, the plan to stop clopidogrel would be documented in P, while the fact that he is on clopidogrel would remain in S.
